a.label:
Sir Roger Beauchamp
d.1373/4 · of Bletsoe; predeceased his father the 1st Baron · History of Parliament Online

families.note: MODERATE CONFIDENCE — Roger Beauchamp, 2nd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe, was son of Sir Roger Beauchamp (d.1373/4), who predeceased his own father Roger Beauchamp, 1st Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe; the 2nd Baron therefore inherited from his grandfather. History of Parliament names his mother only tentatively ('probably' Joan, dau./heiress of William Clopton, widow of Sir Walter Walcot); because a 'Joan Clopton' is already recorded in this tree as the 2nd Baron's WIFE (41_grandparents_d5.json), the maternal identity is left as a placeholder to avoid conflation. History of Parliament Online 'Beauchamp, Sir Roger (1362-1406)'.
